subject: feat(branding): gradient header text + chart line icon
body:
Header "Farlume" now uses bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-accent
with bg-clip-text text-transparent, matching canva-grid pattern.
Auto-syncs with DaisyUI theme combos in both light and dark mode.

Icon changed from F monogram to rising chart line — better represents
a finance app. Updated generate-icons.mjs to wrap all content elements
in the maskable safe-zone transform (not just <path>).

Tags: branding, ux, icon
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: branding
Semver: minor
